{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Fisher woman
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Fisher woman]] uses a curved blade.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A young [[Fisher woman]] carries a hook in each hand.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
